'''jatotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilcrop|oilcrop]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilcrop|oilcrop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jatotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jætetheth|jætetheth]] || [[word:jætethej|jætethej]] || [[word:jætethesh|jætethesh]] || [[word:jætethe|jætethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatotothoth|jatotothoth]] || [[word:jatotothoj|jatotothoj]] || [[word:jatotothosh|jatotothosh]] || [[word:jatototho|jatototho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatothoth|jatothoth]] || [[word:jatothoj|jatothoj]] || [[word:jatothosh|jatothosh]] || [[word:jatotho|jatotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatofthoth|jatofthoth]] || [[word:jatofthoj|jatofthoj]] || [[word:jatofthosh|jatofthosh]] || [[word:jatofthof|jatofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jatothotho|jatothotho]] || [[word:jatothojo|jatothojo]] || [[word:jatothosho|jatothosho]] || [[word:jatothoko|jatothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jatothoth|jatothoth]] || [[word:jatothoj|jatothoj]] || [[word:jatothosh|jatothosh]] || [[word:jatotho|jatotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jatothothol|jatothothol]] || [[word:jatothojol|jatothojol]] || [[word:jatothoshol|jatothoshol]] || [[word:jatothokol|jatothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jatothothotho|jatothothotho]] || [[word:jatothojojo|jatothojojo]] || [[word:jatothoshosho|jatothoshosho]] || [[word:jatothoko|jatothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jatothothon|jatothothon]] || [[word:jatothojon|jatothojon]] || [[word:jatothoshon|jatothoshon]] || [[word:jatothokon|jatothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jatothothoro|jatothothoro]] || [[word:jatothojoro|jatothojoro]] || [[word:jatothoshoro|jatothoshoro]] || [[word:jatothokoro|jatothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
